Motion To Compel Discovery
Off Calendar Aug-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant HEATHER BARTON'S Motion To Compel Discovery compel responses for production of documents and form interrogatories is GRANTED. Defendant's motion for monetary sanctions is GRANTED. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey R. Windsor; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
